kind: algorithmic complexity-class replacement (O(n log n) -> O(n)) for F32/F16/BF16/U32/U64/I32 TopK
lever_summary: eval_top_k_dense covered only i64/f64 dense; F32/F16/BF16/U32/U64/I32 fell to the generic O(n log n) full comparison sort. Added a Literal-backed complement-key radix branch (mirrors pass99 sort): float=!f64_total_order_key(as_f64), unsigned=!as_u64, signed=!((as_i64 as u64)^(1<<63)) + order_top_k_pairs (partial selection for small k, stable radix for large k).
method: same-bench A/B; baseline = stashed generic comparison-sort top-k; normalized by eval/sort_calib_reduce_64k_i64 (ReduceSum, unaffected).

change.lever: Added a Literal-backed dtype-keyed complement-key branch to eval_top_k_dense (F32/F16/BF16/U32/U64/I32). Added eval/topk_64k_k128_f32 bench + top_k_f32_radix_matches_reference test (k=1/32/257).

isomorphism.type: BIT-IDENTICAL to generic top_k (complement key -> descending value, in-slice index -> ascending tie order, == compare_sort_keys(b,a).then(idx)); values=original literals, indices=i64
isomorphism.validation: top_k_f32_radix_matches_reference (k=1/32/257, NaN/inf/-0/payload/dups by bits) + 6 topk tests pass

validation.name: topk_tests
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --release top_k

validation.name: clippy
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

note: Completes radix coverage of the sort family (sort + topk) across all single-key numeric dtypes. One branch covers F32/F16/BF16/U32/U64/I32; only F32 benched/parity-tested directly (others share identical machinery; U32 key validated by pass99).
